case_title: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. SIMONE VIEGAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE- UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 210058127) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC SERVED DEC-28-2023, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT VIEGAS, SIMONE
